name: brainstorm
description: Generate, expand, and refine ideas across topics. Quick brainstorms for fast inspiration; deep brainstorms for richer multi-angle exploration with refined results.

interface.shortDescription: Fast idea generation and multi-angle refinement.
interface.longDescription: Generate, expand, and refine ideas across any topic. Quick brainstorms for fast inspiration; deep brainstorms explore from multiple angles and refine to the strongest few.
